wand_of_firebolts.name: Wand of Firebolts
wand_of_firebolts.description: A slim rod that spits a bolt of flame. 12 charges.

wand_of_frost.name: Wand of Frost
wand_of_frost.description: An ice-blue wand that looses a ray of killing cold.

wand_of_magic_missiles.name: Wand of Magic Missiles
wand_of_magic_missiles.description: Unerring darts of force leap from its tip.

wand_of_lightning.name: Wand of Lightning
wand_of_lightning.description: A crackling wand that hurls a stroke of lightning.

wand_of_entangle.name: Wand of Entangling
wand_of_entangle.description: Green shoots burst from the ground where it points.

wand_of_fear.name: Wand of Fear
wand_of_fear.description: A wand of blackened bone that fills foes with dread.

staff_of_flame.name: Staff of Flame
staff_of_flame.description: A gnarled staff crowned with an ember that never dies.

staff_of_healing.name: Staff of Healing
staff_of_healing.description: A white staff that mends grievous wounds.

staff_of_thunder.name: Staff of Thunder
staff_of_thunder.description: Storms answer its call — lightning leaps foe to foe.

staff_of_the_woodlands.name: Staff of the Woodlands
staff_of_the_woodlands.description: A living staff that grows forests at a druid's word.

rod_of_conjuring.name: Rod of Conjuring
rod_of_conjuring.description: A rod that calls forth clean water from the air.

wand_of_disintegration.name: Wand of Disintegration
wand_of_disintegration.description: A dread wand that reduces stone and wall to dust.

staff_of_the_magi.name: Staff of the Magi
staff_of_the_magi.description: The archmage's staff — it calls fire from the heavens and brims with power.

orb_of_dragonkind.name: Orb of Dragonkind
orb_of_dragonkind.description: A smoldering orb that wakes a dragon's wrath.

horn_of_blasting.name: Horn of Blasting
horn_of_blasting.description: A great brass horn whose note shatters the air in flame.
